payload.subject: Allwin wave 009 server-to-GPU refine timeout investigation
payload.root_cause: Both production attempts reached the Linux vtext server and then the GPU Ollama endpoint, but the full single-transcript refine request exceeded the deployed 900s LLM relay read timeout. The evidence points to lesson-size / full-output refine cost, not a broken network path, dead LLM worker, ASR outage, or wrong GPU ownership boundary.

attempt_evidence.exception: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='192.168.0.33', port=7866): Read timed out. (read timeout=900)
requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPConnectionPool(host='192.168.0.33', port=7866): Read timed out. (read timeout=900)

worker_health.after_attempt_1: The worker accepted the next transcription request at 2026-07-21 20:24:06 after b8e5de78 timed out.
worker_health.after_attempt_2: The LLM worker immediately started queued job 4e888dc9 at 2026-07-21 21:08:55 after d98a5348 timed out.
worker_health.current_health: GET /health returned status=ok, ASR workers=0/2 busy, ASR queue=0/16, LLM workers=0/1 busy, LLM queue=0/16.

connectivity_checks.gpu_tags: GET http://192.168.0.33:7866/api/tags succeeded and listed qwen3.5:9b.
connectivity_checks.gpu_short_chat: POST http://192.168.0.33:7866/api/chat with qwen3.5:9b succeeded in about 5.6s.
connectivity_checks.server_short_relay: POST /llm/chat through http://127.0.0.1:8000 completed job be55d63e in 0.5s.
connectivity_checks.server_long_probe: A controlled 45,500-character relay probe completed job ba79f853 in 15.4s with short output.
connectivity_checks.gpu_model_state: GET /api/ps showed qwen3.5:9b resident, context_length=32768, size_vram=9876742784.

service_side_change.reason: No additional Linux service change is recommended for this incident. The known 300s blocker was already removed by llm_timeout=900. The remaining failure is a full-transcript refine shape that can still exceed 900s.

recommended_correction.summary: Recover the failed lesson with a chunked refine path over existing raw transcript artifacts, then assemble contract-complete clean and summary outputs. Do not rerun ASR unless raw transcript validation fails.
details: Split transcript.raw.txt or transcript.raw.srt into bounded chunks before correction.
Run correction on each chunk via the server relay, preserving order.
Generate summary.md from chunk summaries or from a bounded clean-text summary pass.
Write manifest errors/warnings explicitly if any chunk falls back.
Keep production GPU ownership on the Linux server; do not point Windows/vBook directly at 192.168.0.33.

vbook_guidance.disposition: keep wave 009 paused until chunked refine recovery is available
vbook_guidance.retry: Do not perform another same-shape full-transcript refine retry through the current single request path; it is likely to hit the same 900s timeout.
vbook_guidance.safe_recovery: Use targeted refine-only recovery from existing raw outputs with chunking, then revalidate the bundle contract.

notes: GPU-side host shell logs were not available from the Linux vtext session; available GPU evidence came from Ollama HTTP APIs.
No service restart was performed during this investigation.
